ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine batch */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number assigned to the wine */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was produced */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine type (e.g., red, white) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the wine is produced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine (e.g., red, white, rosé) */,
  "blend_percentage" REAL /* Blend percentage of different grape varieties used in the wine production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_wine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_type_id") REFERENCES wine_types ("wine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the producer */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the producer was established */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the region */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine type */,
  "wine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of chemical properties */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides of the wine */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the chemical properties data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sulfur_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of sulfur properties */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sulfur properties data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sulfur_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of physical properties */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the physical properties data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the wine (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the wine */,
  "rating_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the quality rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_rated_by FOREIGN KEY ("rated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control manager, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the wine batch */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine batch was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "production_batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of the production batch */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the production process */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Production method used (e.g., traditional, organic) */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Production cost of the wine batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_records_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compliance check */,
  "compliance_certificate" TEXT /* Compliance certificate number or document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of wine sold */,
  "sale_price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of wine sold */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, offline, wholesale) */,
  "sale_region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory check */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the wine batch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the wine batch in the inventory */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions of the wine batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_records_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grape_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the grape variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_grape_varieties" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grape variety */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the grape variety used in the wine production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id", "variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_awards" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id", "award_id")
)
